english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response: does not mean that thing is true. When a lot of people say the same thing, it can feel safe to go with it. But the number of people who think something does not tell us if the thing is right or wrong. First, think about how many people have the same idea. They may be all looking at the same picture, they may be listening to the same story, or they may be scared of being different. All these things make each person feel a certain way about the idea. Second, look at what actually happens when you try the idea. watch if it works in real life. If it helps people and does not hurt them, then it might be good. If if it hurts people, then it will probably lead to bad things. Third, ask yourself why the group thinks the idea is right. Sometimes people do not see a reason, they do not hear the same story. They keep their own thoughts hidden. So, you should not take a thought as true only because a large crowd says it. First: know that many people can be wrong. Second; know that many can be wrong means we need to check the thing itself. Third point is that we must use our own mind to decide. This way we do not get stuck with a wrong idea just because many others hold it.

english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do

When we learn one thing about a thing, we may put that idea in our mind as if it were true. This can make us stop looking for other ideas that might be different. Then, when we act on what we think we know, we may find that what we do is not as good as we thought. This means we are missing parts of the picture that would change our view. Next, we see how this can lead to hurt things. If we think we already know enough, we do not ask questions or listen to others. We miss out on new ideas because we think we are done. Finally, we understand that it is better to say we do not know everything. When us admit we are not sure, we can look for more information. We can learn new things. This way, we stay open to new ideas and avoid doing things wrong. So, the bad part is that our mind closes itself too fast.
